hero.tagline: Taree's local workshop — all makes, all models
hero.subtext: Mechanical repairs, logbook servicing, pink and blue slips, AC regas — everything your car needs, at one address in Taree. We quote before we start, and we call if anything changes so you always know what you're paying.

aircon.heading: Automotive air conditioning, done properly.
aircon.subheading: Corney's holds an ARCtick licence — the Australian authorisation to handle automotive refrigerant. If your AC isn't cold, bring it in. We'll diagnose it, fix it, and have you back in cool air.
aircon.priceSub: Standard passenger vehicle · All-inclusive · Quoted up front
aircon.leakTestSub: If your system has lost gas, we find the leak first so the repair lasts — then regas once it's sealed.
points: Licensed to handle all automotive refrigerants (R134a, R1234yf)
Proper recovery, evacuation and recharge — to manufacturer spec
Leak diagnosis with UV dye or nitrogen pressure test
Full component repair (compressor, condenser, expansion valve)

whyUs.heading: Workshop work done the right way — every single time.
whyUs.subtext: Four reasons Taree drivers have kept coming back for 20 years.

points.title: A Quote Before We Lift a Spanner
points.desc: We diagnose, we call, we quote. Then you decide. The invoice matches the quote you approved — always.

points.title: Licensed Across the Board
points.desc: ARCtick for AC work. AUVIS for blue slips. NSW authorised for pink slips and defect clearances. Everything your car needs, under one roof.

points.title: Warranty-Safe Logbook Servicing
points.desc: Serviced to manufacturer specs, stamped by the book, recorded properly. Your new-car warranty stays exactly where it should.

points.title: The Mechanics Work on Your Car
points.desc: Jarrad, Don and Toby — the three names on the shop wall — are the three people holding the spanners. You speak to the mechanic doing the job.

howItWorks.heading: Three steps. No stress.
howItWorks.subtext: From booking to keys-in-hand, here's exactly how it works.

steps.title: Book It In
steps.desc: Call (02) 6552 6131, send a message, or drop by. We'll lock in a time that suits — usually same week, often sooner.

steps.title: We Diagnose & Quote
steps.desc: Drop your car at 16 Albert Lane. We check it over, call you with a clear quote before starting, and only do what you've approved.

steps.title: Keys Back, Job Done
steps.desc: We message when it's ready. Clear rundown of what was done, why, and what the bill was — matching the quote.

testimonials.heading: What Taree drivers say.
testimonials.subtext: Five stars on Google. Here's why.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Booked in for a logbook service, they called before doing anything extra — found a cracked rear shock but gave me the option. Done by 4pm, quote matched the bill to the dollar. That's exactly how it should be.

reviews.name: Dave R.
reviews.text: Front brakes started grinding on a Monday morning. Rang Corney's at 8am, they fit me in by 10, had new pads and machined rotors back to me same day. Proper job, fair price, no drama.

reviews.name: Michelle T.
reviews.text: AC had been weak for ages. Corney's did a proper leak test, found a bad O-ring on the condenser, fixed it and regassed. Ice cold since. $189 regas plus the repair — quoted up front, exactly as promised.

reviews.name: Tom K.
reviews.text: Pink slip done in under an hour. They flagged a CV boot starting to split — not a fail, but warned me before it became one. That's the kind of heads-up you get from mechanics who care about doing the job right.

reviews.name: Karen B.
reviews.text: New-car warranty means I had to stick to the logbook. Corney's used the right oil, the right filter, stamped the book, emailed me the invoice. Warranty intact and a great result.

reviews.name: James L.
reviews.text: Interstate plates, rego expired. Needed a blue slip before I could re-register. Corney's are an AUVIS station so it was a simple one-visit job. Straight, fast, sorted.
